durinBestBuild.title: Durin Best Build
durinBestBuild.intro: Durin performs best as an off-field Pyro sub-DPS with stable Energy Recharge and balanced CRIT stats.

items.title: Quick Build
items.description: ATK sands, Pyro goblet, CRIT circlet, then tune Energy until Burst uptime is stable.

items.title: Support Form
items.description: Use the utility-focused form when your team needs extra Pyro application and setup control.

items.title: Burst Form
items.description: Use the damage-focused form when Vaporize or Melt teams can amplify Durin Burst hits.

items.title: Reaction Build
items.description: Elemental Mastery setups work when Durin triggers Burgeon, Overloaded, or Melt windows often.

durinBestTeams.title: Durin Best Teams
durinBestTeams.intro: Durin fits both Pyro-reaction cores and utility-heavy lineups that need consistent off-field pressure.

items.name: Durin Overload Team
items.description: Pair Durin with Electro supports and a carry that benefits from sustained Pyro uptime.

items.name: Durin Vaporize Team
items.description: Hydro-driven teams can convert Durin off-field Pyro into strong Vaporize damage windows.

items.name: Durin Burning Team
items.description: Dendro pairings enable stable Burning pressure while Durin rotates around Burst uptime.

items.name: Durin Utility Team
items.description: Use Durin with buffers and grouping units when team comfort is more important than peak damage.

durinMaterials.title: Durin Materials
durinMaterials.intro: Prepare ascension and talent materials early so Durin can reach useful breakpoints on release day.
items: Farm local specialties first to remove the biggest leveling bottleneck.
Collect boss drops in parallel with talent books to reduce resin waste.
Prioritize Mora and EXP reserves before pushing high talent levels.
Track enemy drops weekly so Durin upgrades stay on schedule.

durinWeapons.title: Durin Weapons
durinWeapons.intro: Durin prefers swords with CRIT value, Burst scaling, or team utility depending on your role target.

items.name: Athame Artis
items.description: Best-in-slot option for balanced personal damage and team value.

items.name: Premium CRIT Swords
items.description: High-end alternatives improve Burst consistency when stats are optimized.

items.name: Strong 4-Star Picks
items.description: Several four-star swords remain efficient when premium options are unavailable.

durinArtifacts.title: Durin Artifacts
durinArtifacts.intro: Durin artifacts should be chosen by role: Burst-focused damage, team support, or reaction-trigger play. Prioritize enough Energy Recharge first, then scale CRIT, ATK, and Elemental Mastery by team.

items.name: A Day Carved From Rising Winds (4pc)
items.description: Top personal-damage set for Dark Form and off-field Burst damage, with strong ATK and CRIT scaling in optimized teams.

items.name: Noblesse Oblige (4pc)
items.description: Best team-buff alternative for White Form support when no other unit already provides Noblesse uptime.

items.name: Emblem of Severed Fate (4pc)
items.description: Safe general set when Durin needs more Energy Recharge and stable Burst cycles across varied team setups.

items.name: Mixed 2pc Options
items.description: Reliable temporary setup while farming, combining Burst, Pyro, ATK, EM, or ER bonuses with better sub-stats.

items.name: Marechaussee Hunter (4pc)
items.description: Niche on-field option in HP-fluctuation teams, mainly when running Durin with Furina-style support patterns.

items.name: Durin Stat Targets
items.description: Aim for stable ER, balanced CRIT, and enough ATK for passive scaling, with extra EM in Vaporize, Melt, Overloaded, or Burgeon teams.

durinTalentsAndKit.title: Durin Talents and Kit
durinTalentsAndKit.intro: Durin's kit is built around switching between White Form and Dark Form, then timing Burst windows around your team reaction plan.

items.description: Durin uses a standard sword string, but Normal Attack is low priority unless you play him on-field.
Use the Skill sequence to enter White Form for support utility or Dark Form for stronger personal damage.
White Form enables off-field AoE Pyro pressure and team-oriented utility for Pyro-related reaction lineups.
Dark Form is for Vaporize and Melt damage paths where Durin's own Burst contribution is the focus.
Durin Burst is the primary talent value point and should be leveled first for most account builds.
Ascension passives improve team resistance pressure in White Form and increase reaction damage value in Dark Form.
White route: Skill into White Form, then Burst. Dark route: Skill into Dark Form, then Burst during buff windows.
Standard upgrade order is Burst first, Skill second, and Normal Attack last unless running on-field Durin.

durinConstellations.title: Durin Constellations
durinConstellations.intro: Durin is fully usable at C0, with C1 and C2 as high-impact upgrades and C6 as the premium ceiling for heavy vertical investment.

items.name: Durin C0 Baseline
items.description: Strong base version with off-field Pyro damage, form-based utility, and practical fit in multiple reaction archetypes.

items.name: Durin C1 Upgrade
items.description: Major first constellation that improves stack-based damage value for both support-leaning and personal-damage play.

items.name: Durin C2 Checkpoint
items.description: Best early stopping point for many accounts, adding strong team elemental value in Pyro-reaction cycles.

items.name: Durin C3 and C5
items.description: Bridge constellations that raise talent levels and improve scaling but are usually not primary stopping targets.

items.name: Durin C4 Power Spike
items.description: Meaningful Burst-focused upgrade with stronger stack efficiency when already investing beyond C2.

items.name: Durin C6 Ceiling
items.description: Maximum-investment endpoint with high defense-ignore value and the strongest personal damage scaling.

durinBannerReleaseGuide.title: Durin Banner and Release Guide
durinBannerReleaseGuide.intro: Track Durin release timing, limited banner availability, and pull breakpoints so you can plan wishes and upgrade resources efficiently.

items.name: Durin Character Profile
items.description: Durin is a limited 5-star Pyro Sword character mainly used for off-field sub-DPS and flexible support routing.

items.name: Durin Debut Window
items.description: Durin debuted on December 3, 2025 and first ran through December 23, 2025 during Version Luna III.

items.name: Durin Current Rerun
items.description: Current rerun window is May 20, 2026 to June 9, 2026, making this the active period to pull Durin directly.

items.name: Durin Banner Status
items.description: Durin remains a limited character and can only be obtained when his Character Event Wish is available.

items.name: Durin Pull Value
items.description: High value for players needing a flexible Pyro slot that can pivot between team support and Burst damage roles.

items.name: Durin Investment Stops
items.description: C0 is functional for broad use, while C2 is the common value stop before considering premium C6 investment.

faq.title: Durin
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for common Durin planning questions

questions.question: Is Durin better as support or damage?
questions.answer: Durin can do both, but most accounts get the best results by starting with a support-friendly setup and shifting to damage once stats are stable.

questions.question: What should I farm first for Durin?
questions.answer: For Durin, farm ascension materials and talent books first, then finalize artifacts once your baseline levels are complete.

questions.question: Do I need high constellations for Durin?
questions.answer: Durin is usable at low investment, while higher constellations mainly improve comfort and ceiling rather than baseline playability.

cta.title: Stay Ready for Durin Updates
